title: SenseNova-MARS: Multimodal Agentic Reasoning and Search with Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: SenseNova-MARS
defines.definition: A multimodal agentic reasoning and search framework that enables VLMs to interleave visual reasoning with image search, text search, and image crop tool use through reinforcement learning.

defines.name: HR-MMSearch
defines.definition: A search-oriented benchmark of high-resolution images and knowledge-intensive questions for evaluating agentic visual search models.

defines.name: BN-GSPO
defines.definition: A batch-normalized extension of Group Sequence Policy Optimization designed to stabilize reinforcement learning for multi-tool agentic VLM training.

problem: Existing VLM agents are limited to text-centric reasoning or isolated tool calls and cannot robustly interleave reasoning with multiple external tools for complex high-resolution, knowledge-intensive visual tasks.
